home.heading: What do you use OpenClaw for?
home.subheading: Select a scenario, get the optimal config
home.heroSubtitle: Minimal config effort, maximum cost savings.
home.heroDescription: Select your use case, generate optimized routing config with one click, and save 60-80% on OpenClaw costs instantly.
home.featureSavingDesc: Smart routing saves you 60-80% on OpenClaw costs
home.featureOOTBDesc: Preset scenario templates, no need to manually configure complex YAML
home.featureOSDesc: All code is fully open source, community-driven continuous improvement

sceneDescriptions.trading-bot: Crypto/stock automated trading, requires fast response and data analysis
sceneDescriptions.customer-service: Intelligent customer support, requires language understanding and quick response
sceneDescriptions.content-creation: Article writing, copywriting, requires high-quality output
sceneDescriptions.data-analysis: Data processing, visualization, statistical analysis, requires reasoning and coding
sceneDescriptions.research-assistant: Academic research, literature analysis, requires deep reasoning and long context
sceneDescriptions.dev-tools: Code generation, debugging, refactoring, requires code understanding and generation

modelSelector.title: Model Selection
modelSelector.primaryHint: This is the default model. Prefer low cost and fast speed.
modelSelector.fallbackHint: Used when the primary model is unavailable, ordered by priority

templates.title: Template Marketplace
templates.description: Browse and search community-contributed routing config templates

apiDiscovery.title: API Model Discovery
apiDiscovery.description: Enter your API endpoint and key to auto-discover available models and generate OpenClaw config
apiDiscovery.apiKeyLabel: API Key (optional, some endpoints don't need one)

configImport.title: Import & Health Check
configImport.description: Paste openclaw.json to auto-parse + diagnose issues
configImport.completionTestDesc: Send a real chat request to verify models can actually answer questions
configImport.noKeysForTest: No API keys configured, cannot test model capabilities

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An error occurred while loading the page
